name: get_media_details
description: Retrieve full details of a media item in the library by its ID, including prompt, type, URL, metadata, and any edits or transcription.

media_id.description: The ID of the media item to retrieve.

name: generate_image
description: Generate an image using AI based on a text prompt. The image is added to the media library.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate.

negative_prompt.description: Elements to exclude from the generated image.

name: generate_video
description: Generate a short video clip from a text prompt or source media. The video is added to the media library.

prompt.description: Text description of the video content to generate.

duration_seconds.description: Desired duration of the video in seconds. Default 10.

source_media_id.description: Optional ID of a source image or video to animate or extend.

name: edit_media
description: Edit an existing media item in the library. Supports cropping, filtering, adding text overlays, and more.

media_id.description: The ID of the media item to edit.

name: publish_content
description: Publish a media item from the library to a connected publishing account (e.g. social media, blog, video platform).

media_id.description: The ID of the media item to publish.

account_id.description: The ID of the publishing account to post to.

caption.description: Caption or description text to accompany the published content.

tags.description: List of tags or hashtags for the published content.

schedule_time.description: ISO 8601 datetime to schedule publication. If omitted, publishes immediately.

name: search_stock_media
description: Search a stock media library for images, videos, or audio clips matching a query.

media_type.description: Type of media to search: 'image', 'video', 'audio'. Default 'image'.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 10.

name: transcribe_audio
description: Transcribe audio from a media item (audio or video) into text.

media_id.description: The ID of the media item containing audio to transcribe.

include_timestamps.description: Whether to include timestamps in the transcription. Default false.
